title: Ceragon Siklu MultiHaul and EtherHaul Series

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Ceragon Siklu MultiHaul and EtherHaul Series
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/15
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*portal.ceragon.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
